channel.title: Pigsty – PGSQL 扩展插件
channel.description: Recent content in PGSQL 扩展插件 on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: RPM 扩展插件
item.description:
Pigsty 中共有

扩展 标准包名 版本 类目 仓库 说明
timescaledb timescaledb 2.15.3 TIME TIMESCALEDB 时序数据库扩展插件
periods periods 1.2 TIME PGDG 为 PERIODs 和 SYSTEM VERSIONING 提供标准 SQL 功能
temporal_tables temporal_tables 1.2.2 TIME PGDG 时态表功能支持
emaj emaj 4.4.0 TIME PGDG 让数据库的子集具有细粒度日志和时间旅行功能
table_version table_version 1.10.3 TIME PGDG PostgreSQL 版本控制表扩展
pg_cron pg_cron 1.6 TIME PGDG 定时任务调度器
pg_later pg_later 0.1.1 TIME PIGSTY 执行查询，并在稍后异步获取查询结果
pg_background pg_background 1.0 TIME PGDG 在后台运行 SQL 查询
postgis postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 几何和地理空间扩展
postgis_topology postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 拓扑空间类型和函数
postgis_raster postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 光栅类型和函数
postgis_sfcgal postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS SFCGAL 函数
postgis_tiger_geocoder postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS tiger 地理编码器和反向地理编码器
address_standardizer postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG 地址标准化函数。
address_standardizer_data_us postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG 地址标准化函数：美国数据集示例
pgrouting pgrouting 3.6.0 GIS PGDG 提供寻路能力
pointcloud pointcloud 1.2.5 GIS PIGSTY 提供激光雷达点云数据类型支持
pointcloud_postgis pointcloud 1.2.5 GIS PGDG 将激光雷达点云与PostGIS几何类型相集成
h3 pg_h3 4.1.3 GIS PGDG H3六边形层级索引支持
h3_postgis pg_h3 4.1.3 GIS PGDG H3与PostGIS集成的扩展插件
q3c q3c 2.0.1 GIS PIGSTY Q3C天空索引插件
ogr_fdw ogr_fdw 1.1 GIS PGDG GIS 数据外部数据源包装器
geoip geoip 0.3.0 GIS PGDG IP 地理位置扩展（围绕 MaxMind GeoLite 数据集的包装器）
vector pgvector 0.7.3 RAG PGDG 向量数据类型和 ivfflat / hnsw 访问方法
vectorscale pgvectorscale 0.2.0 RAG PIGSTY 使用DiskANN算法对向量进行高效索引
vectorize pg_vectorize 0.17.0 RAG PIGSTY 在PostgreSQL中封装RAG向量检索服务
pg_similarity pg_similarity 1.0 RAG PIGSTY 提供17种距离度量函数
pg_tiktoken pg_tiktoken 0.0.1 RAG PIGSTY 在PostgreSQL中计算OpenAI使用的Token数
pgml pgml 2.9.3 RAG PIGSTY PostgresML：用SQL运行机器学习算法并训练模型
pg_search pg_search 0.8.6 FTS PIGSTY ParadeDB BM25算法全文检索插件，ES全文检索
pg_bigm pg_bigm 1.2 FTS PGDG 基于二字组的多语言全文检索扩展
zhparser zhparser 2.2 FTS PIGSTY 中文分词，全文搜索解析器
hunspell_cs_cz hunspell_cs_cz 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell捷克语全文检索词典
hunspell_de_de hunspell_de_de 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell德语全文检索词典
hunspell_en_us hunspell_en_us 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell英语全文检索词典
hunspell_fr hunspell_fr 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell法语全文检索词典
hunspell_ne_np hunspell_ne_np 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell尼泊尔语全文检索词典
hunspell_nl_nl hunspell_nl_nl 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell荷兰语全文检索词典
hunspell_nn_no hunspell_nn_no 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell挪威语全文检索词典
hunspell_pt_pt hunspell_pt_pt 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell葡萄牙语全文检索词典
hunspell_ru_ru hunspell_ru_ru 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell俄语全文检索词典
hunspell_ru_ru_aot hunspell_ru_ru_aot 1.0 FTS PIGSTY Hunspell俄语全文检索词典（来自AOT.ru小组）
citus citus 12.1-1 OLAP PGDG Citus 分布式数据库
citus_columnar citus 11.3-1 OLAP PGDG Citus 列式存储
columnar hydra 11.1-11 OLAP PIGSTY 开源列式存储扩展
pg_lakehouse pg_lakehouse 0.8.6 OLAP PIGSTY ParadeDB 湖仓分析引擎
duckdb_fdw duckdb_fdw 1.0.0 OLAP PIGSTY DuckDB 外部数据源包装器 (libduck 0.10.2)
pg_fkpart pg_fkpart 1.7 OLAP PGDG 按外键实用程序进行表分区的扩展
pg_partman pg_partman 5.1.0 OLAP PGDG 用于按时间或 ID 管理分区表的扩展
plproxy plproxy 2.11.0 OLAP PGDG 作为过程语言实现的数据库分区
pg_strom pg_strom 5.1 OLAP PGDG 使用GPU与NVMe加速大数据处理
age age 1.5.0 FEAT PIGSTY Apache AGE，图数据库扩展 （Deb可用）
hll hll 2.18 FEAT PGDG hyperloglog 数据类型
rum rum 1.3 FEAT PGDG RUM 索引访问方法
pg_graphql pg_graphql 1.5.7 FEAT PIGSTY PG内的 GraphQL 支持 (RUST, supabase)
pg_jsonschema pg_jsonschema 0.3.1 FEAT PIGSTY 提供JSON Schema校验能力
jsquery jsquery 1.1 FEAT PGDG 用于内省 JSONB 数据类型的查询类型
pg_hint_plan pg_hint_plan 1.6.0 FEAT PGDG 添加强制指定执行计划的能力
hypopg hypopg 1.4.1 FEAT PGDG 假设索引，用于创建一个虚拟索引检验执行计划
imgsmlr imgsmlr 1.0 FEAT PIGSTY 使用Haar小波分析计算图片相似度
pg_ivm pg_ivm 1.8 FEAT PGDG 增量维护的物化视图
pgmq pgmq 1.2.1 FEAT PIGSTY 基于Postgres实现类似AWS SQS/RSMQ的消息队列
pgq pgq 3.5.1 FEAT PGDG 通用队列的PG实现
pg_tle pg_tle 1.2.0 LANG PIGSTY AWS 可信语言扩展
plv8 plv8 3.2.2 LANG PIGSTY PL/JavaScript (v8) 可信过程程序语言
plluau pllua 2.0 LANG PGDG Lua 程序语言（不受信任的）
pllua pllua 2.0 LANG PGDG Lua 程序语言
plprql plprql 0.1.0 LANG PIGSTY 在PostgreSQL使用PRQL——管线式关系查询语言
pldbgapi pldebugger 1.1 LANG PGDG 用于调试 PL/pgSQL 函数的服务器端支持
plpgsql_check plpgsql_check 2.7 LANG PGDG 对 plpgsql 函数进行扩展检查
plprofiler plprofiler 4.2 LANG PGDG 剖析 PL/pgSQL 函数
plsh plsh 2 LANG PGDG PL/sh 程序语言
pljava pljava 1.6.6 LANG PGDG Java 程序语言
plr plr 8.4.6 LANG PGDG 从数据库中加载R语言解释器并执行R脚本
pgtap pgtap 1.3.1 LANG PGDG PostgreSQL单元测试框架
faker faker 0.5.3 LANG PGDG 插入生成的测试伪造数据，Python库的包装
dbt2 dbt2 0.45.0 LANG PGDG OSDL-DBT-2 测试组件
prefix prefix 1.2.0 TYPE PGDG 前缀树数据类型
semver semver 0.32.1 TYPE PGDG 语义版本号数据类型
pgmp pgmp 1.1 TYPE PGDG 多精度算术扩展
uint pguint 0 TYPE PGDG 无符号整型数据类型
unit pgunit 7 TYPE PGDG SI 国标单位扩展
roaringbitmap roaringbitmap 0.5 TYPE PIGSTY 支持RoaringBitmap数据类型
md5hash md5hash 1.0.1 TYPE PIGSTY 提供128位MD5的原生数据类型
asn1oid asn1oid 1 TYPE PIGSTY ASN1OID数据类型支持
numeral numeral 1 TYPE PIGSTY 数值类型扩展
pg_rational pg_rational 0.0.2 TYPE PIGSTY 使用BIGINT表示的有理数数据类型
ip4r ip4r 2.4 TYPE PGDG PostgreSQL 的 IPv4/v6 和 IPv4/v6 范围索引类型
pg_sphere pg_sphere 1.5.1 TYPE PIGSTY 球面对象函数、运算符与索引支持
pgfaceting pgfaceting 0.2.0 TYPE PIGSTY 使用倒排索引的高速切面查询
timestamp9 timestamp9 1.4.0 TYPE PGDG 纳秒分辨率时间戳
gzip pg_gzip 1.0 FUNC PGDG 使用SQL执行Gzip压缩与解压缩
http pg_http 1.6 FUNC PGDG HTTP客户端，允许在数据库内收发HTTP请求 (supabase)
topn topn 2.6.0 FUNC PGDG top-n JSONB 的类型
pg_net pg_net 0.8.0 FUNC PGDG 用 SQL 进行异步非阻塞HTTP/HTTPS 请求的扩展 (supabase)
pgjwt pgjwt 0.2.0 FUNC PIGSTY JSON Web Token API 的PG实现 (supabase)
shacrypt shacrypt 1.1 FUNC PIGSTY 实现SHA256-CRYPT与SHA512-CRYPT密钥加密算法
pgsql_tweaks pgsql_tweaks 0.10.3 FUNC PGDG 一些日常会用到的便利函数与视图
pg_extra_time pg_extra_time 1.1.3 FUNC PGDG 一些关于日期与时间的扩展函数
count_distinct count_distinct 3.0.1 FUNC PGDG COUNT(DISTINCT …) 聚合的替代方案
extra_window_functions extra_window_functions 1.0 FUNC PGDG 额外的窗口函数
first_last_agg first_last_agg 0.1.4 FUNC PIGSTY first() 与 last() 聚合函数
tdigest tdigest 1.4.1 FUNC PGDG tdigest 聚合函数
pgpcre pgpcre 1 FUNC PIGSTY PCRE/Perl风格的正则表达式支持
icu_ext icu_ext 1.8 FUNC PIGSTY 访问ICU库提供的函数
pg_idkit pg_idkit 0.2.3 FUNC PIGSTY 生成各式各样的唯一标识符：UUIDv6, ULID, KSUID
pg_hashids pg_hashids 1.3 FUNC PIGSTY 加盐将整型ID转为短字符串ID
pg_uuidv7 pg_uuidv7 1.5 FUNC PGDG UUIDv7 支持
permuteseq permuteseq 1.2 FUNC PIGSTY 伪随机数ID置换生成器
sequential_uuids sequential_uuids 1.0.2 FUNC PIGSTY 生成连续生成的UUID
pg_repack pg_repack 1.5.0 ADMIN PGDG 在线垃圾清理与表膨胀治理
pg_squeeze pg_squeeze 1.6 ADMIN PGDG 从关系中删除未使用空间
pg_dirtyread pg_dirtyread 2 ADMIN PIGSTY 从表中读取尚未垃圾回收的行
pgfincore pgfincore 1.3.1 ADMIN PGDG 检查和管理操作系统缓冲区缓存
pgdd pgdd 0.5.2 ADMIN PIGSTY 提供通过标准SQL查询数据库目录集簇的能力
ddlx ddlx 0.27 ADMIN PGDG 提取数据库对象的DDL
prioritize prioritize 1.0 ADMIN PGDG 获取和设置 PostgreSQL 后端的优先级
pg_checksums pg_checksums 1.1 ADMIN PGDG 在离线模式下激活/启用/禁用数据库集群的校验和功能
pg_readonly pg_readonly 1.0.0 ADMIN PGDG 将集群设置为只读
safeupdate safeupdate 1.4 ADMIN PGDG 强制在 UPDATE 和 DELETE 时提供 Where 条件

pgautofailover pgautofailover 2.1 ADMIN PGDG PG 自动故障迁移
pg_catcheck pg_catcheck 1.4.0 ADMIN PGDG 用于诊断系统目录是否损坏的工具
pre_prepare preprepare 0.4 ADMIN PIGSTY 在服务端预先准备好PreparedStatement备用
pgpool_adm pgpool 1.5 ADMIN PGDG PGPool 管理函数
pgpool_recovery pgpool 1.4 ADMIN PGDG PGPool辅助扩展，从v4.3提供的恢复函数
pgpool_regclass pgpool 1.0 ADMIN PGDG PGPool辅助扩展，RegClass替代
pgagent pgagent 4.2 ADMIN PGDG PostgreSQL任务调度工具，与PGADMIN配合使用
pg_profile pg_profile 4.6 STAT PGDG PostgreSQL 数据库负载记录与AWR报表工具
pg_show_plans pg_show_plans 2.1 STAT PGDG 打印所有当前正在运行查询的执行计划
pg_stat_kcache pg_stat_kcache 2.2.3 STAT PGDG 内核统计信息收集

system_stats system_stats 2.0 STAT PGDG PostgreSQL 的系统统计函数
bgw_replstatus bgw_replstatus 1.0.6 STAT PGDG 用于汇报本机主从状态的后台工作进程

pgexporter_ext pgexporter_ext 0.2.3 STAT PGDG PGExporter的额外指标支持
pg_top pg_top 3.7.0 STAT PGDG 像unix top命令一样监控PG进程
passwordcheck_cracklib passwordcheck 3.0.0 SEC PGDG 使用cracklib加固PG用户密码
supautils supautils 3.1.9 SEC PIGSTY 用于在云环境中确保数据库集群的安全
pgsodium pgsodium 3.1.9 SEC PGDG 表数据加密存储 TDE

multicorn multicorn 3.0 FDW PGDG 用Python编写自定义的外部数据源包装器
mongo_fdw mongo_fdw 1.1 FDW PGDG MongoDB 外部数据包装器
mysql_fdw mysql_fdw 1.2 FDW PGDG MySQL外部数据包装器
sqlite_fdw sqlite_fdw 1.1 FDW PGDG SQLite 外部数据包装器
hdfs_fdw hdfs_fdw 2.0.5 FDW PGDG hdfs 外部数据包装器

pgmemcache pgmemcache 2.3.0 SIM PGDG 为PG提供memcached兼容接口
pgtt pgtt 4.0.0 SIM PGDG 类似Oracle的全局临时表功能
orafce orafce 4.10 SIM PGDG 模拟 Oracle RDBMS 的一部分函数和包的函数和运算符
pg_statement_rollback pg_statement_rollback 1.4 SIM PGDG 在服务端提供类似Oracle/DB2的语句级回滚能力
pg_dbms_metadata pg_dbms_metadata 1.0.0 SIM PGDG 添加 Oracle DBMS_METADATA 兼容性支持的扩展

pglogical_origin pglogical 1.0.0 ETL PGDG 用于从 Postgres 9.4 升级时的兼容性虚拟扩展

mimeo mimeo 1.5.1 ETL PIGSTY 在PostgreSQL实例间进行表级复制
repmgr repmgr 5.4 ETL PGDG PostgreSQL复制管理组件
pgcopydb pgcopydb 0.15 ETL PGDG 将一个PostgreSQL数据库拷贝至目标服务器
pgloader pgloader 3.6.10 ETL PGDG 从MySQL/SQLite/MSSQL一键迁移至PostgreSQL！
pg_fact_loader pg_fact_loader 2.0 ETL PGDG 在 Postgres 中构建事实表
pg_bulkload pg_bulkload 3.1.21 ETL PGDG 向 PostgreSQL 中高速加载数据
pg_comparator pg_comparator 2.2.5 ETL PGDG 比对两个PostgreSQL数据库内容的差异
pgimportdoc pgimportdoc 0.1.4 ETL PGDG 将XML，JSON，BYTEA文档导入PG数据库
pgexportdoc pgexportdoc 0.1.4 ETL PGDG 从PG中导出XML，JSON，BYTEA文档

item.title: Docs: DEB 扩展插件
item.description:
扩展 标准包名 版本 类目 仓库 说明
timescaledb timescaledb 2.15.3 TIME TIMESCALEDB 时序数据库扩展插件
periods periods 1.2 TIME PGDG 为 PERIODs 和 SYSTEM VERSIONING 提供标准 SQL 功能
temporal_tables temporal_tables 1.2.2 TIME PIGSTY 时态表功能支持
emaj emaj devel TIME PIGSTY 让数据库的子集具有细粒度日志和时间旅行功能
table_version table_version 1.10.3 TIME PIGSTY PostgreSQL 版本控制表扩展
pg_cron pg_cron 1.6 TIME PGDG 定时任务调度器
pg_later pg_later 0.1.1 TIME PIGSTY 执行查询，并在稍后异步获取查询结果
pg_background pg_background 1.2 TIME PIGSTY 在后台运行 SQL 查询
postgis postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 几何和地理空间扩展
postgis_topology postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 拓扑空间类型和函数
postgis_raster postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS 光栅类型和函数
postgis_sfcgal postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS SFCGAL 函数
postgis_tiger_geocoder postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG PostGIS tiger 地理编码器和反向地理编码器
address_standardizer postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG 地址标准化函数。
address_standardizer_data_us postgis 3.4.2 GIS PGDG 地址标准化函数：美国数据集示例
pgrouting pgrouting 3.6.2 GIS PGDG 提供寻路能力
pointcloud pointcloud 1.2.5 GIS PGDG 提供激光雷达点云数据类型支持
pointcloud_postgis pointcloud 1.2.5 GIS PGDG 将激光雷达点云与PostGIS几何类型相集成
h3 pg_h3 4.1.3 GIS PGDG H3六边形层级索引支持
h3_postgis pg_h3 4.1.3 GIS PGDG H3与PostGIS集成的扩展插件

item.title: Docs: Contrib 扩展插件
item.description:
PostgreSQL 中自带了 73 个扩展插件，在 EL 与 Debian/Ubuntu 系统中都可用。

扩展 版本 类目 说明
adminpack 2.1 ADMIN PostgreSQL 管理函数集合
amcheck 1.3 ADMIN 校验关系完整性
basebackup_to_shell null ADMIN 添加一种备份到Shell终端到基础备份方式
basic_archive null ADMIN 归档模块样例
lo 1.1 ADMIN 大对象维护
oid2name null ADMIN 用于检查PG文件结构的实用命令行工具
old_snapshot 1.0 ADMIN 支持 old_snapshot_threshold 的实用程序
pg_prewarm 1.2 ADMIN 预热关系数据
pg_surgery 1.0 ADMIN 对损坏的关系进行手术
vacuumlo null ADMIN 从PostgreSQL中移除孤儿数据库文件的实用命令行工具
test_decoding null ETL 基于SQL的WAL逻辑解码样例
dblink 1.2 FDW 从数据库内连接到其他 PostgreSQL 数据库
file_fdw 1.0 FDW 访问外部文件的外部数据包装器
postgres_fdw 1.1 FDW 用于远程 PostgreSQL 服务器的外部数据包装器
bloom 1.0 FEAT bloom 索引-基于指纹的索引
fuzzystrmatch 1.2 FTS 确定字符串之间的相似性和距离
pg_trgm 1.6 FTS 文本相似度测量函数与模糊检索
autoinc 1.0 FUNC 用于自动递增字段的函数
btree_gin 1.3 FUNC 用GIN索引常见数据类型
btree_gist 1.7 FUNC 用GiST索引常见数据类型
dict_int 1.0 FUNC 用于整数的文本搜索字典模板
dict_xsyn 1.0 FUNC 用于扩展同义词处理的文本搜索字典模板
insert_username 1.0 FUNC 用于跟踪谁更改了表的函数
intagg 1.1 FUNC 整数聚合器和枚举器（过时）
intarray 1.5 FUNC 1维整数数组的额外函数、运算符和索引支持
moddatetime 1.0 FUNC 跟踪最后修改时间
refint 1.0 FUNC 实现引用完整性的函数
tcn 1.0 FUNC 用触发器通知变更
tsm_system_rows 1.0 FUNC 接受行数限制的 TABLESAMPLE 方法
tsm_system_time 1.0 FUNC 接受毫秒数限制的 TABLESAMPLE 方法
unaccent 1.1 FUNC 删除重音的文本搜索字典
uuid-ossp 1.1 FUNC 生成通用唯一标识符（UUIDs）
earthdistance 1.1 GIS 计算地球表面上的大圆距离
bool_plperl 1.0 LANG 在 bool 和 plperl 之间转换
bool_plperlu 1.0 LANG 在 bool 和 plperlu 之间转换
hstore_plperl 1.0 LANG 在 hstore 和 plperl 之间转换适配类型
hstore_plperlu 1.0 LANG 在 hstore 和 plperlu 之间转换适配类型
hstore_plpython null LANG 在 hstore 和 plpython 之间转换适配类型
hstore_plpython3u 1.0 LANG 在 hstore 和 plpython3u 之间转换
jsonb_plperl 1.0 LANG 在 jsonb 和 plperl 之间转换
jsonb_plperlu 1.0 LANG 在 jsonb 和 plperlu 之间转换
jsonb_plpython null LANG 在 jsonb 和 plpython 之间转换适配类型
jsonb_plpython3u 1.0 LANG 在 jsonb 和 plpython3u 之间转换
ltree_plpython null LANG 在 ltree 和 plpython 之间转换适配类型
ltree_plpython3u 1.0 LANG 在 ltree 和 plpython3u 之间转换
plperl 1.0 LANG PL/Perl 存储过程语言
plperlu 1.0 LANG PL/PerlU 存储过程语言（未受信/高权限）
plpgsql 1.0 LANG PL/pgSQL 程序设计语言
plpython3u 1.0 LANG PL/Python3 存储过程语言（未受信/高权限）
pltcl 1.0 LANG PL/TCL 存储过程语言
pltclu 1.0 LANG PL/TCL 存储过程语言（未受信/高权限）
tablefunc 1.0 OLAP 交叉表函数
auth_delay null SEC 在返回认证失败前暂停一会，避免爆破
passwordcheck null SEC 用于强制拒绝修改弱密码的扩展
pgcrypto 1.3 SEC 实用加解密函数
sepgsql null SEC 基于SELinux标签的强制访问控制
auto_explain null STAT 提供一种自动记录执行计划的手段
pageinspect 1.12 STAT 检查数据库页面二进制内容
pg_buffercache 1.4 STAT 检查共享缓冲区缓存
pg_freespacemap 1.2 STAT 检查自由空间映射的内容（FSM）
pg_stat_statements 1.10 STAT 跟踪所有执行的 SQL 语句的计划和执行统计信息
pg_visibility 1.2 STAT 检查可见性图（VM）和页面级可见性信息
pg_walinspect 1.1 STAT 用于检查 PostgreSQL WAL 日志内容的函数
pgrowlocks 1.2 STAT 显示行级锁信息
pgstattuple 1.5 STAT 显示元组级统计信息
sslinfo 1.2 STAT 关于 SSL 证书的信息
citext 1.6 TYPE 提供大小写不敏感的字符串类型
cube 1.5 TYPE 用于存储多维立方体的数据类型
hstore 1.8 TYPE 用于存储（键，值）对集合的数据类型
isn 1.2 TYPE 用于国际产品编号标准的数据类型
ltree 1.2 TYPE 用于表示分层树状结构的数据类型
seg 1.4 TYPE 表示线段或浮点间隔的数据类型
xml2 1.1 TYPE XPath 查询和 XSLT

item.title: Docs: duckdb_fdw
item.description:
Synopsis

  • Name: duckdb_fdw

  • Version: v1.0.0.

  • Category: OLAP, FDW

  • Package Name:

    • EL: pg_lakehouse_$v (16, 15)
    • Debian: not available yet
    • Ubuntu: not available yet

  • Metadata

    • CREATE EXTENSION: yes
    • Relocatable: yes
    • shared_preload_libraries: NO

  • DuckDB Website

  • GitHub: duckdb_fdw

  • Building libduckdb

Install

To install duckdb_fdw on your PostgreSQL server, define it in pg_extensions

pg_extensions:
  - duckdb_fdw_$v*

Or manually install with yum|dnf for specific PG major version:

yum install duckdb_fdw_16*    # install duckdb_fdw for PostgreSQL 16

It will install libduckdb as dependency.

Create Extension

After install the duckdb_fdw yum package, you can create the extension inside PostgreSQL database:

-- create extension
CREATE EXTENSION duckdb_fdw;

-- create duckdb_fdw server
CREATE SERVER duckdb_server FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER duckdb_fdw OPTIONS (database '/tmp/duck.db');

-- create user mapping [OPTIONAL]
-- GRANT USAGE ON FOREIGN SERVER duckdb_server TO PUBLIC;

SELECT duckdb_fdw_version();

-- You can execute duckdb command with `duckdb_execute`, for example, to create a table inside duckdb:
-- create a table in duckdb
SELECT duckdb_execute('duckdb_server', 'CREATE TABLE t1 (a integer,b varchar);');

-- create duckdb foreign table mapping that duckdb table
CREATE FOREIGN TABLE t1 (
    a integer,
    b text
) SERVER duckdb_server OPTIONS (
    table 't1'
);

-- write some data and read it back
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT i AS a,i::text AS b FROM generate_series(1,10) i;
SELECT * FROM t1;

You can also import foreign schema from duckdb server, for example, create a table with duckdb cli:

duckdb /tmp/duck.db

CREATE TABLE t1 (
  a integer,
  b text
);
  
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'a'), (2 , 'b'), (3, 'c');
SELECT * FROM t1;

Then import the schema into PostgreSQL:

IMPORT FOREIGN SCHEMA public FROM SERVER duckdb_server INTO public;

Building

You can only build this on EL8 & EL9 (EL7 not supported), to build duckdb_fdw, you also need to build libduckdb from source.

To build libduckdb-src, use the same building args as building duckdb_fdw:

clang++ -c -fPIC -std=c++11 -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 duckdb.cpp -o duckdb.o
clang++ -shared -o libduckdb.so *.o

To build libduckdb:

cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make libduckdb

To build duckdb_fdw:

cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make duckdb_fdw

item.title: Docs: pg_lakehouse
item.description:
Metadata

  • Available PG & OS: EL 8/9: PG15, PG16

  • Extension Package Name: pg_lakehouse_$v

  • In shared_preload_libraries: yes

  • Need CREATE EXTENSION: *yes

  • pg_lakehouse: A DuckDB Alternative in Postgres

  • Putting DuckDB in Postgres to Query Iceberg

Quick Start

Example, read parquet file from S3:

CREATE EXTENSION pg_lakehouse;
CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER parquet_wrapper HANDLER parquet_fdw_handler VALIDATOR parquet_fdw_validator;

-- Provide S3 credentials
CREATE SERVER parquet_server FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER parquet_wrapper;

-- Create foreign table with auto schema creation
CREATE FOREIGN TABLE trips ()
SERVER parquet_server
OPTIONS (files 's3://paradedb-benchmarks/yellow_tripdata_2024-01.parquet');

-- Success! Now you can query the remote Parquet file like a regular Postgres table
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips;
  count
---------
 2964624
(1 row)

This fdw is read-only for now.

Iceberg Support

CREATE EXTENSION pg_lakehouse;

CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER iceberg_wrapper
    HANDLER iceberg_fdw_handler
    VALIDATOR iceberg_fdw_validator;

CREATE SERVER iceberg_server
    FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER iceberg_wrapper;

-- Replace the dummy schema with the actual schema
CREATE FOREIGN TABLE iceberg_table (x INT)
    SERVER iceberg_server
    OPTIONS (files 's3://bucket/iceberg_folder');

-- Success! You can now query the Iceberg table
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iceberg_table;

构建pg_lakehouse

下面是在 EL8 与 EL9 上构建 pgml 的教程。

首先，根据 RPM 构建环境 的说明，配置好 环境与代理，安装 rust 与 pgrx， 特别注意 pg_lakehouse 使用的 pgrx 版本号。

克隆 ParadeDB，并 检出最新版本

cd ~; git clone --recursive git@github.com:paradedb/paradedb.git;
cd ~/paradedb; git checkout v0.8.2

cd ~/paradedb/pg_lakehouse/
cargo update

# build pg_lakehouse
pg16 build
pg15 build

# move to rpmbuild SOURCES dir
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_lakehouse_16;  cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_lakehouse-pg16   ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_lakehouse_16;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_lakehouse_15;  cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_lakehouse-pg15   ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_lakehouse_15;

# packaging with rpmbuild
cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make pg_lakehouse
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 16" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_lakehouse.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 15" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_lakehouse.spec

item.title: Docs: pg_search
item.description:
Metadata

  • Available PG & OS: EL 8/9: PG15, PG16

  • Extension Package Name: pg_search_$v

  • In shared_preload_libraries: yes

  • Need CREATE EXTENSION: *yes

  • Docs: pg_search

  • GitHub: pg_search

构建pg_search

下面是在 EL8 与 EL9 上构建 pg_search 的教程。

首先，根据 RPM 构建环境 的说明，配置好 环境与代理，安装 rust 与 pgrx， 特别注意 pg_search 使用的 pgrx 版本号。

克隆 ParadeDB，并 检出最新版本，完成编译，打包：

cd ~; git clone --recursive git@github.com:paradedb/paradedb.git;
cd ~/paradedb; git checkout v0.8.6

cd ~/paradedb/pg_search/
cargo update

# build pg_search
pg16 build
pg15 build
pg14 build
pg13 build
pg12 build

# move to rpmbuild SOURCES dir
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_16; cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_search-pg16 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_16;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_15; cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_search-pg15 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_15;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_14; cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_search-pg14 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_14;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_13; cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_search-pg13 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_13;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_12; cp -r ~/paradedb/target/release/pg_search-pg12 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pg_search_12;

# packaging with rpmbuild
cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make pg_search
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 16" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_search.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 15" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_search.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 14" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_search.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 13" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_search.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 12" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pg_search.spec

item.title: Docs: pgvectorscale
item.description:
Metadata

  • Available PG & OS: EL 8/9: PG15, PG16

  • Extension Package Name: pgvectorscale_$v

  • In shared_preload_libraries: yes

  • Need CREATE EXTENSION: *yes

  • Dependencies: pgvector

  • GitHub: pgvectorscale

快速上手

例如，创建一个

CREATE EXTENSION vectorscale CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_embedding  (
    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
    metadata JSONB,
    contents TEXT,
    embedding VECTOR(1536)
);
  
CREATE INDEX document_embedding_idx ON document_embedding
USING diskann (embedding);

SELECT *
FROM document_embedding
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1
LIMIT 10

This fdw is read-only for now.

构建pgvectorscale

下面是在 EL8 与 EL9 上构建 PGML 的教程。

首先，根据 RPM 构建环境 的说明，配置好 环境与代理，安装 rust 与 pgrx， 特别注意 pgvectorscale 使用的 pgrx 版本号。

克隆 pgvectorscale，并 检出最新版本

cd ~/pgvectorscale/pgvectorscale 

# build pgvectorscale
export RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+avx2,+fma"
pg16 build
pg15 build

# move to rpmbuild SOURCES dir
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/vectorscale_16; cp -r ~/pgvectorscale/pgvectorscale/target/release/vectorscale-pg16 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/vectorscale_16;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/vectorscale_15; cp -r ~/pgvectorscale/pgvectorscale/target/release/vectorscale-pg15 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/vectorscale_15;

# packaging with rpmbuild
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 16" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pgvectorscale.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 15" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pgvectorscale.spec

item.title: Docs: plv8
item.description:
Metadata

  • Available PG & OS: EL 8/9: PG12 ~ PG16

  • Extension Package Name: plv8_$v

  • In shared_preload_libraries: no

  • Need CREATE EXTENSION: *yes

  • Dependencies: nil

  • 官方网站：PLv8

  • GitHub 仓库地址：PLv8

快速上手

CREATE EXTENSION plv8;

SELECT plv8_version();
SELECT plv8_info();

DO $$ plv8.elog(NOTICE, plv8.version); $$ LANGUAGE plv8;

Example:

CREATE FUNCTION plv8_test(keys TEXT[], vals TEXT[]) RETURNS JSON AS $$
    var o = {};
    for(var i=0; i<keys.length; i++){
        o[keys[i]] = vals[i];
    }
    return o;
$$ LANGUAGE plv8 IMMUTABLE STRICT;


SELECT plv8_test(ARRAY['name', 'age'], ARRAY['Tom', '29']);

构建plv8

  • GitHub Repo: PLv8

安装依赖 （EL）：

sudo yum groupinstall --nobest -y 'Development Tools'; 
sudo yum install git cmake

克隆代码：

rpmdev-setuptree
cd ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/
git clone git@github.com:plv8/plv8.git

cd plv8; git checkout v3.2.2
make -j16

基于第一段编译产物，针对不同 PG 大版本制作 RPM 包：

rpmbuild --define "pgmajorversion 16"  -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/plv8.spec
rpmbuild --define "pgmajorversion 15"  -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/plv8.spec
rpmbuild --define "pgmajorversion 14"  -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/plv8.spec
rpmbuild --define "pgmajorversion 13"  -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/plv8.spec
rpmbuild --define "pgmajorversion 12"  -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/plv8.spec

或者：

cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make plv8

item.title: Docs: PostgresML
item.description:
Metadata

  • Available PG & OS: EL 8/9: PG14 - PG16, Ubuntu

  • Extension Package Name: pgml_$v

  • In shared_preload_libraries: yes

  • Need CREATE EXTENSION: *yes

  • Website: PostgresML

  • GitHub: Postgresml

Overview

PostgresML is an PostgreSQL extension with the support for latest LLMs, vector operations, classical Machine Learning and good old Postgres application workloads.

PostgresML (pgml) is a PostgreSQL extension written in Rust. You can run standalone docker images, but this is not a docker-compose template introduction, this file is for documentation purpose only.

PostgresML is officially supported on Ubuntu 22.04, but we also maintain an RPM version for EL 8/9, if you don’t need CUDA & NVIDIA stuff.

You’ll need the Internet access on the database nodes to download python dependencies from PyPI and models from HuggingFace.

Configuration

PostgresML is a RUST extension with official Ubuntu support. Pigsty maintains an RPM version for PostgresML on EL8 and EL9.

Launch new Cluster

PostgresML 2.7.9 is available for PostgreSQL 15 on Ubuntu 22.04 (Official), Debian 12 and EL 8/9 (Pigsty). To enable pgml, you have to install the extension first:

pg-meta:
  hosts: { 10.10.10.10: { pg_seq: 1, pg_role: primary } }
  vars:
    pg_cluster: pg-meta
    pg_users:
      - {name: dbuser_meta     ,password: DBUser.Meta     ,pgbouncer: true ,roles: [dbrole_admin]    ,comment: pigsty admin user }
      - {name: dbuser_view     ,password: DBUser.Viewer   ,pgbouncer: true ,roles: [dbrole_readonly] ,comment: read-only viewer for meta database }
    pg_databases:
      - { name: meta ,baseline: cmdb.sql ,comment: pigsty meta database ,schemas: [pigsty] ,extensions: [{name: postgis, schema: public}, {name: timescaledb}]}
    pg_hba_rules:
      - {user: dbuser_view , db: all ,addr: infra ,auth: pwd ,title: 'allow grafana dashboard access cmdb from infra nodes'}
    pg_libs: 'pgml, pg_stat_statements, auto_explain'
    pg_extensions: [ 'pgml_15 pgvector_15 wal2json_15 repack_15' ]  # ubuntu
    #pg_extensions: [ 'postgresql-pgml-15 postgresql-15-pgvector postgresql-15-wal2json postgresql-15-repack' ]  # ubuntu

In EL 8/9, the extension name is pgml_15, corresponding name in ubuntu/debian is postgresql-pgml-15. and add pgml to pg_libs.

Enable on Existing Cluster

To enable pgml on existing cluster, install with ansible package module:

ansible pg-meta -m package -b -a 'name=pgml_15'
# ansible el8,el9 -m package -b -a 'name=pgml_15'           # EL 8/9
# ansible u22 -m package -b -a 'name=postgresql-pgml-15'    # Ubuntu 22.04 jammy

Python Dependencies

You also have to install python dependencies for PostgresML on cluster nodes. Official tutorial: installation

Install Python & PIP

Make sure python3, pip and venv is installed:

# ubuntu 22.04 (python3.10), you have to install pip & venv with apt
sudo apt install -y python3 python3-pip python3-venv

For EL 8 / EL9 and compatible distros, you can use python3.11

# el 8/9, you can upgrade default pip & virtualenv if applicable
sudo yum install -y python3.11 python3.11-pip       # install latest python3.11
python3.11 -m pip install --upgrade pip virtualenv  # use python3.11 on el8 / el9
Using pypi mirrors

For mainland China user, consider using the tsinghua pypi mirror.

pip config set global.index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple    # setup global mirror (recommended)
pip install -i https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple some-package        # one-time install

Install Requirements

Create a python virtualenv and install requirements from requirements.txt and requirements-xformers.txt with pip.

If you are using EL 8/9, you have to replace the python3 with python3.11 in the following commands.

su - postgres;                          # create venv with dbsu
mkdir -p /data/pgml; cd /data/pgml;     # make a venv directory
python3    -m venv /data/pgml           # create virtualenv dir (ubuntu 22.04)
source /data/pgml/bin/activate          # activate virtual env

# write down python dependencies and install with pip
cat > /data/pgml/requirments.txt <<EOF
accelerate==0.22.0
auto-gptq==0.4.2
bitsandbytes==0.41.1
catboost==1.2
ctransformers==0.2.27
datasets==2.14.5
deepspeed==0.10.3
huggingface-hub==0.17.1
InstructorEmbedding==1.0.1
lightgbm==4.1.0
orjson==3.9.7
pandas==2.1.0
rich==13.5.2
rouge==1.0.1
sacrebleu==2.3.1
sacremoses==0.0.53
scikit-learn==1.3.0
sentencepiece==0.1.99
sentence-transformers==2.2.2
tokenizers==0.13.3
torch==2.0.1
torchaudio==2.0.2
torchvision==0.15.2
tqdm==4.66.1
transformers==4.33.1
xgboost==2.0.0
langchain==0.0.287
einops==0.6.1
pynvml==11.5.0
EOF

# install requirements with pip inside virtualenv
python3 -m pip install -r /data/pgml/requirments.txt
python3 -m pip install xformers==0.0.21 --no-dependencies

# besides, 3 python packages need to be installed globally with sudo!
sudo python3 -m pip install xgboost lightgbm scikit-learn

Enable PostgresML

After installing the pgml extension and python dependencies on all cluster nodes, you can enable pgml on the PostgreSQL cluster.

Configure cluster with patronictl command and add pgml to shared_preload_libraries, and specify your venv dir in pgml.venv:

shared_preload_libraries: pgml, timescaledb, pg_stat_statements, auto_explain
pgml.venv: '/data/pgml'

After that, restart database cluster, and create extension with SQL command:

CREATE EXTENSION vector;        -- nice to have pgvector installed too!
CREATE EXTENSION pgml;          -- create PostgresML in current database
SELECT pgml.version();          -- print PostgresML version string

If it works, you should see something like:

# create extension pgml;
INFO:  Python version: 3.11.2 (main, Oct  5 2023, 16:06:03) [GCC 8.5.0 20210514 (Red Hat 8.5.0-18)]
INFO:  Scikit-learn 1.3.0, XGBoost 2.0.0, LightGBM 4.1.0, NumPy 1.26.1
CREATE EXTENSION

# SELECT pgml.version(); -- print PostgresML version string
 version
---------
 2.7.8

You are all set! Check PostgresML for more details: https://postgresml.org/docs/guides/use-cases/

构建 PGML

构建 PostgresML 是相当麻烦的工作，下面是在 EL8 与 EL9 上构建 PGML 的教程。

首先，根据 RPM 构建环境 的说明，配置好 环境与代理，安装 rust 与 pgrx，特别注意 pgml 使用的 pgrx 版本号。

准备Python3

安装 Python，并设置为默认版本：

sudo yum install python3.11 python3.11-devel python3-virtualenv openssl openssl-devel cmake pkg-config libomp libomp-devel openblas* llvm llvm-devel lld openblas*
sudo alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.11 1
sudo alternatives --set python3 /usr/bin/python3.11
sudo alternatives --set python /usr/bin/python3.11

准备代码仓库

克隆 pgml，并 检出指定版本：

cd ~; git clone --recursive git@github.com:postgresml/postgresml.git; 
cd ~/postgresml && git checkout v2.9.3
cd ~/postgresml/pgml-extension

EL8专用编译说明

本节修改在 EL8 上进行，EL9 无需执行此操作。

sudo dnf install gcc-toolset-13
source /opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/enable

source /opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/enable
export CC=/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/gcc
export CXX=/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/g++
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/lib64:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

在 EL8 上构建时，需要修改 build.rs 文件，在合适的位置添加两行编译选项：

println!("cargo:rustc-link-lib=static=stdc++fs");
println!("cargo:rustc-link-search=native=/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/13");

整个文件应该是这样的：

fn main() {
    #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
    {
        println!("cargo:rustc-link-search=/opt/homebrew/opt/openblas/lib");
        println!("cargo:rustc-link-search=/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib");
    }

    // PostgreSQL is using dlopen(RTLD_GLOBAL). this will parse some
    // of symbols into the previous opened .so file, but the others will use a
    // relative offset in pgml.so, and will cause a null-pointer crash.
    //
    // hide all symbol to avoid symbol conflicts.
    //
    // append mode (link-args) only works with clang ld (lld)
    println!(
        "cargo:link-args=-Wl,--version-script={}/ld.map",
        std::env::current_dir().unwrap().to_string_lossy(),
    );

    println!("cargo:rustc-link-lib=static=stdc++fs");
    println!("cargo:rustc-link-search=native=/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/13");

    vergen::EmitBuilder::builder().all_git().emit().unwrap();
}

接着修改 Cargo.toml

在 [build-dependencies] 一节中添加：cc = "1.0"：

[build-dependencies]
+++ cc = "1.0"

开始构建

针对 PostgreSQL 16, 15, 14 构建 PGML：

cd ~/postgresml/pgml-extension; pg16 build; pg15 build; pg14 build;

将构建产物放置于 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES 目录备用

rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_16; cp -r ~/postgresml/pgml-extension/target/release/pgml-pg16 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_16;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_15; cp -r ~/postgresml/pgml-extension/target/release/pgml-pg15 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_15;
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_14; cp -r ~/postgresml/pgml-extension/target/release/pgml-pg14 ~/rpmbuild/SOURCES/pgml_14;

使用 pgml.spec 执行 RPM 打包：

cd ~/rpmbuild/SPECS && make pgml

# 或手工进行构建：
rm -rf ~/rpmbuild/RPMS/x86_64/pgml*.rpm;
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 16" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pgml.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 15" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pgml.spec
rpmbuild --without debuginfo --define "pgmajorversion 14" -ba ~/rpmbuild/SPECS/pgml.spec
